title: BX (Bedrock Experience)
description: A Semi Dark Bedrock Stylized GUI That Enhances Your Vanilla Experience
body: Do you want to enjoy the sleek and modern design of the new bedrock edition UIs in your Minecraft Java Edition? If so, you might want to try out BX, a resource pack that changes the appearance of buttons, sliders, menus, and other UI elements to match the style of the bedrock previews. BX is compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1. The pack does not alter the layout or functionality of the UI, just the aesthetics. BX is perfect for fans of vanilla Minecraft who want to spice up their user interface with a fresh and elegant look.
